description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-button

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-button/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 96 (A)
**Known issues:** formAssociated and _internals missing descriptions.

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. All variants (primary, secondary, ghost, destructive). States (hover, active, focus, disabled). Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. Button role. Disabled state (aria-disabled vs disabled). Loading state. Icon-only buttons need labels.
3. **Functionality** — All variants. Sizes. Loading state. Icon slots (start/end). Form submission (ElementInternals). Click events. Link mode (href).
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. formAssociated static. ElementInternals typing. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts (button). Ripple effect integration. Focus-ring.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Fix formAssociated + _internals descriptions.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. All variants. Form integration. Keyboard (Enter/Space). Disabled state.
8. **Storybook** — All variants/sizes/states. Loading. Icons. Form demo.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Form actions. Twig attributes. Drupal AJAX compatibility.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. Form-associated custom element support.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-button
